title: entity parameter
text: entity parameter A constructed data type parameter for transferring occurrences of entities between components. Compare with occurrence parameter. A type of constructed parameter to an operation. Related Links occurrence parameter A constructed data type parameter containing a single occurrence of an entity, for use in transferring entity data between components. operation A script module that can be activated from other script modules, either from within the current component or from another component. It is analogous to a method in other programming languages, and is declared with operation ProcScript statement. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
